name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit positions through Experience Intelligence sub-brands (Profusion for data analytics, Amplify Analytix for CX measurement) emphasizing GenAI-driven predictive analytics and behavioral intelligence for financial services. Their methodology centers on proprietary data platforms rather than Qualtrics/Medallia ecosystems, targeting mid-to-large banks and insurers in EU and India. Delivery model blends managed analytics services with consulting engagements. Thought leadership themes focus on AI-powered customer intelligence, real-time decisioning, and financial services digital transformation.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta's methodology integrates SAP operational data with Qualtrics experience data through embedded analytics and AI-driven workflow automation on SAP BTP. Their AI stance is firmly enterprise-practical, focusing on AI agents that automate experience-to-action workflows within existing SAP landscapes. Delivery model combines deep SAP technical integration with UX design thinking for DACH enterprise clients. Thought leadership emphasizes closing the experience-operations gap, AI-augmented decision-making, and SAP-native experience management for complex enterprise environments.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics positions as the leading Qualtrics partner for GCC government and public sector CX transformation, with deep methodology around citizen experience measurement, journey mapping, and digital service optimization. Their AI approach emphasizes text analytics and sentiment analysis within Qualtrics for Arabic and English language feedback across government touchpoints. Delivery model combines strategic CX consulting with Qualtrics platform implementation and managed services. Thought leadership themes center on national vision alignment (Vision 2030, UAE strategies), public sector modernization, and experience-driven governance.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX operates as a research-led global CX advisory combining proprietary measurement frameworks (Forces of CX, Creative Excellence) with Medallia technology partnerships. Their methodology emphasizes statistical rigor, behavioral science, and longitudinal benchmarking across industries. AI approach focuses on advanced analytics and predictive modeling within their proprietary research platforms. Delivery model is consulting-heavy with large-scale multi-country CX measurement programs. Thought leadership centers on experience ROI quantification, loyalty economics, and sector-specific consumer behavior insights.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont positions as a specialist Qualtrics implementation and strategy partner with deep vertical expertise in banking and financial services. Their methodology emphasizes experience orchestration, closed-loop action management, and AI agent deployment within Qualtrics ecosystems. AI stance focuses on practical AI application through Qualtrics-native capabilities including intelligent routing, predictive analytics, and automated experience workflows. Delivery model combines strategic XM advisory with hands-on Qualtrics platform engineering. Thought leadership themes center on financial services CX transformation, regulatory-compliant feedback systems, and AI-augmented customer experience programs.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak positions as a UK/EU Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in enterprise XM program design and implementation. Their methodology historically emphasizes research-grade survey design, advanced analytics, and strategic CX program management for regulated industries. AI stance and post-X4 2026 positioning remain unclear due to extended content inactivity. Delivery model combines Qualtrics technical implementation with CX strategy consulting for UK and European enterprise clients.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap positions as a platform-agnostic CX and EX consulting firm specializing in experience design and organizational transformation across Spain and Latin America. Their methodology emphasizes journey-centric design thinking, employee experience as a driver of customer experience, and change management frameworks. AI stance remains secondary to human-centered consulting approaches. Delivery model is consulting-led with strategic advisory, journey mapping workshops, and transformation program management. Thought leadership themes include employee experience design, customer journey optimization, and organizational culture transformation.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo positions as the leading Iberoamerican CX consultancy with Qualtrics-certified operations spanning 15+ Spanish-speaking markets. Their methodology combines Voice of Customer program design, CX maturity assessment, and digital experience optimization with Qualtrics platform implementation. AI approach remains more traditional, focusing on text analytics and NPS-driven insights rather than advanced AI agent deployment. Delivery model combines strategic CX consulting with Qualtrics technical services across a distributed Latin American and Spanish market footprint. Thought leadership themes center on CX strategy, customer-centric culture transformation, and VoC program excellence.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant positions as a global digital transformation and AI engineering firm with CX capabilities housed within their Connected Experiences Studio. Their methodology is engineering-led, emphasizing build-over-buy approaches to CX platforms through custom AI solutions, composable architectures, and large-scale system integration. AI stance is aggressively forward-leaning with generative AI, AI engineering, and enterprise AI adoption as core corporate themes. Delivery model combines large-scale engineering teams with design studios for end-to-end digital experience delivery. Thought leadership focuses on AI-driven enterprise transformation, digital product development, and technology-first approaches to customer experience.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy positions as a premier North American Qualtrics partner specializing in enterprise XM program strategy and AI-driven experience orchestration. Their methodology emphasizes strategic XM program design, AI agent deployment within Qualtrics, and ROI-focused experience management for large enterprises. AI stance is strongly aligned with Qualtrics post-X4 2026 AI capabilities including experience orchestration, intelligent automation, and predictive analytics. Delivery model combines senior-level strategic advisory with hands-on Qualtrics platform optimization featuring marquee clients like CrowdStrike, WestJet, and OLG. Thought leadership themes center on AI agent strategies, enterprise XM maturity, and experience-to-business outcome linkage.
